one_time_description: Chevron Canada Resources court judgment against Louis Bull Tribe for overpayment of royalties ($1,205,378 principal + $762,128 interest); appealed, no provision recorded
economic_notes: Operates a Gas Bar and Convenience Store financed by Bank of Montreal loan. 677626 Alberta Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Kiseputinow Holdings (1996) Ltd. fully consolidated. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with material uncertainty noted.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). One GBE (677626 Alberta Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method with large accumulated deficit of $30.6M against advances of $33.6M. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Kiseputinow Holdings (1996) Ltd. Contingent liability of $1,967,506 from Chevron royalty overpayment court judgment (appealed, no provision recorded). Environmental contamination contingent liability at off-reserve truck stop/gas bar site (no provision). COVID-19 pandemic declared days before year-end with material uncertainty. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $10,979,516 + CMHC $463,122 + FNDF $565,066 = $12,007,704 (approximate, ISETS $620,819 may also be government transfer but classified separately). OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, CMHC, and FNDF transfers.
